title: comanthera reflexa
intro: Comanthera reflexa, also known as the 'False Puya', is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Comanthera reflexa include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. Comanthera reflexa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
